mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_action_logs(id, admin_user_id, action_type, target_type, target_id, action_detail, ip_address, created_at) VALUES(gen_random_uuid(), #{adminUserId}, #{actionType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{actionDetail}, #{ipAddress}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_action_logs WHERE admin_user_id = #{adminUserId}
